API Key (Token)
Stored locally in your browser — never sent anywhere except directly to Samsara's API (api.samsara.com). Get your token from Samsara Cloud → Settings → API Tokens.
⚠️ CORS Required: Samsara's API blocks direct browser requests. Run a tiny local proxy first — takes about 30 seconds.
Option A — Node.js (Recommended)
Requires Node.js (nodejs.org). No npm install needed.
  1. Click Download proxy.js above
  2. Open a terminal in that folder
  3. Run: node proxy.js
  4. You'll see "🛰️ Samsara Proxy — RUNNING"
  5. Enter proxy URL below and click Save
Option B — Python 3
Already on most Macs/Linux. No installs needed.
  1. Click Download proxy.py above
  2. Open a terminal in that folder
  3. Run: python3 proxy.py
  4. You'll see "🛰️ Samsara Proxy — RUNNING"
  5. Enter proxy URL below and click Save
Proxy URL (default: http://localhost:3377)
⚪ No proxy configured — direct API calls (may hit CORS)
Click "Sync All" to pull live data from Samsara.

Consistency
Consistency = how predictable the pay is (5 dots = very consistent, 1 dot = wide variance). Grades: A = above fleet avg RPM, B = within 10% below, C = materially below.

Defaults & Fuel
Applied to all drivers unless overridden individually in the Per Driver section.
Default Split % (0.80)
Default Target Net / Week
Target RPM (Rate Intel highlight)
⛽ EIA National Diesel Price
Click Fetch — no key required
$0.000
Works without a key · Optional free key at eia.gov/opendata/register.php · Weekly on-highway diesel, national avg
Fuel Price ($/gal)
MPG
Maintenance ($/mi)
Default Tolls ($/mi) — auto-applies when no manual toll is entered
Leave at 0 to disable. When set, applies to loaded + deadhead miles on loads with no manual toll entry. Current rate: $0.10/mi
Default Insurance ($/mi) — global default for per-mile drivers
Used when a driver is set to per-mile insurance and has no personal override. Current rate: $0.07/mi
Loads per Week
Tax Rate (0.25)

Global split and target net are defaults — you can override per driver in the Pay Structure pane below.

Google Maps API
Used to auto-calculate loaded and deadhead miles in the load form and Load Simulator. Get a free key at console.cloud.google.com — enable the Routes API and Geocoding API.
Not connected
API Key

Key is stored locally in your browser only — never sent anywhere except Google's API directly.

Fixed Weekly Costs
These costs are saved per driver and split across loads using the "Loads per week" setting.

Tolls ($/mi) — per driver override
Override the global $0.10/mi default for this driver only. Leave blank to use the global default. Applied when no manual toll is entered on a load.
Per-Driver Fuel Overrides — leave blank to use global defaults.

Override global defaults for the currently selected driver.
Driver Type
Split % for this driver
Target Net / Week
Pay Structure
Rate ($/mile)

CPM: Enter dollars per mile (e.g. 0.65 = 65¢/mi). Net shown = company profit after driver pay + costs.

Miles Per Day Capacity

Owner Operator: Split 0.80 = 80%. Net = driver take-home after costs.
Company Driver: CPM, flat per load, or weekly salary. Net = company profit after paying driver + costs.

Paused drivers show a warning when you try to add loads. Adding a load automatically resumes the driver.

McLeod Import
Upload McLeod Excel exports to keep your historical lane data current. New loads merge with the built-in dataset and power both Load Analysis and the Lane Simulator.
📊
Drop McLeod Excel file here
or click to browse  —  .xlsx or .xls
Map Columns
Auto-detected columns from your file. Adjust if needed, then Import.
Current Dataset
🔑 Platform API Keys
Set keys once here and they apply automatically to all users on sign-in. Users never need to enter them manually. User-entered keys always take priority over platform keys.
Google Maps API Key — Routes API + Geocoding API
EIA Fuel API Key — eia.gov (free)
Samsara API Key — Samsara dashboard → API tokens
How it works: Keys are stored in Firestore at platform/keys. Any signed-in user fetches them automatically on login. Keys you enter here show as ••••• set once saved — the raw value is never displayed again for security.

Firestore security rules should restrict platform/keys writes to your admin account only. Reads can be open to any authenticated user.
👑 Admin View
View any user's account data for oversight. Read-only — does not affect their data.
Company Members
Company McLeod Loads in Firestore:
Only [email protected] can upload McLeod data. All users read from the same shared pool.
🧪 Debug & Sync
Tools for diagnosing issues and forcing data sync. Use Force Cloud Reload if your loads are missing after opening a new version of the file.
☁️ Cloud Data Sync
If your loads and drivers are missing, your data is still safe in the cloud. Click Force Reload from Cloud to pull it down immediately — this bypasses the local timestamp check and always loads whatever is saved in Firebase for your account.
🧪 Smoke Test
Runs ~70 automated checks covering all core features: multi-stop, load math, week navigation, form inputs, data integrity, and more. Safe to run any time — no data is permanently modified.
⚠️ Danger Zone
Factory Reset wipes all local data and clears localStorage. This does NOT delete your cloud backup — you can recover by clicking Force Reload from Cloud after resetting.
Privacy: this tool stores data in the cloud (Firebase). All users with login credentials share the same company data.

Find Reload on DAT
Claude in Chrome prompt generator
1️⃣
Copy the prompt
Generated from live driver data
2️⃣
Open DAT One
Log in if needed
3️⃣
Open Claude sidebar
Click the Claude extension icon
4️⃣
Paste & send
Claude reads the page for you
Copied!
Tips for best results
• Run a search on DAT first so loads are visible on screen — Claude reads what it can see.
• You can say "scroll down and check the next 10 too" to see more results.
• Ask Claude to "sort by RPM and filter to 48'+ trailers" and it will operate the filters.
• Avoid doing this repeatedly in quick succession — DAT may rate-limit heavy automated activity.
